channel.title: Flickr Album on jverkamp.com
channel.description: Recent content in Flickr Album on jverkamp.com

item.title: Alaska
item.description:
Twenty years later, another trip to Alaska. We met my parents (who were on a two month trip of their own) for one week. And oh, what a place for taking pictures Alaska is.

View 212 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Alaska Day 7 - Anchorage
item.description:
Our last full day. A bit quieter. We went to a museum and a store with a chocolate fountain.

Such a great trip. I’m ready to head home.

View on Flickr

item.title: Alaska Day 6 - Portage Trails
item.description:
Back through Portage to hike again on our way to Anchorage. We made it to Blue Ice Trail and Byron Glacier Trail. Very cool. Literally.

View 5 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Alaska Day 5 - Homer Tides
item.description:
Our one full day in Homer. We went out to the tidal flats. It wasn’t quite like I expected, but still neat. Also out to the Spit in the evening.

View 23 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Alaska Day 4 - Sealife and Festival
item.description:
We went to the Sealife Center in Seward before the (long) drive to Homer. Along the way, we stopped in Soldotna, which happened to be having a festival. That was a fun surprise.

View 12 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Alaska Day 3 - Seward Boat Tour
item.description:
Out into the ocean. We saw a decent amount of sea life, including three humpbacks (1 calf!), puffins, and seals.

The part out on the more open ocean was so rough. Just about everyone got sick to various extents.

View 29 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Alaska Day 2 - Seward
item.description:
A hike at Exit Glacier and pictures at the marina.

View 10 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Alaska Day 1 - Seward
item.description:
Our first day in Alaska, at a house just outside of Seward. Man. The forests and mountains and rivers and life just everywhere. It’s very pretty.

View 21 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: A Walk at Holliday Park
item.description:
Made it back to Holliday Park for probably the last time until classes begin again this fall.

View 6 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Fireworks 2026
item.description:
The 3rd to the 5th. Good fun!

View on Flickr

item.title: Birds
item.description:
With my new lens, birds are so much easier to take pictures of. And they’re so dynamic. And sometimes weird looking.

View 33 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Indiana Dunes 2025
item.description:
It was really nice the first day–and then cold and rainy after that. So it goes!

View on Flickr

item.title: Clifty Falls 2025
item.description:
A much warmer season to visit Clifty Falls than last year. A great park and some great trails.

View 1 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Kitty Friends
item.description:
Kitties over the years.

View on Flickr

item.title: A Grand Adventure
item.description:
Taking 4 kids and 3 grandparents out West. To Yosemite and then the Bay Area for a week and a half. Beautiful as always and great fun for all.

View 79 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Flower in SF
item.description:
A work trip to San Francisco and everything is already blooming. I got a chance to walk around the city so of course I took it.

View on Flickr

item.title: A Short Stay in San Diego
item.description:
A quick work trip to San Diego. But hey, while we’re there, might as well go to the zoo!

View 37 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Eagle Creek Walks
item.description:
I’ve taken to walking the loop at the Eagle Creek Ornithology Center. A good two miles and so many things to take pictures of.

View 353 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: A Short Return West
item.description:
Had the chance to return to the Bay Area for a week for work. Spent a few days exploring as well with our youngest.

View 25 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Return to Alcatraz
item.description:
A ’team building’ exercise with a twist.

View on Flickr

item.title: Spring Mill Spring 2023
item.description:
Another visit, this time for camping. It’s pretty there.

View on Flickr

item.title: Clifty Falls 2023
item.description:
Another visit to Clifty Falls. Got a year’s weather in 3 days. A nice warm start, a crazy rain, followed by a 30 degree temperature drop. Good to play games and enjoy the pool.

View 20 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Brown County in the Snow
item.description:
Stayed at the cabins near Abe Martin Lodge. Hiked, swam, explored. A good few days.

View 6 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: McCormick's Creek 2023
item.description:
Another year, another first of the year hike. Much less flooded this time around, plus we stayed at the Inn. A great experience.

View 7 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: On-Site in Austin
item.description:
Meeting the new team face to face. Took a few pictures along the way. A neat downtown. Reminds me of SF.

View 6 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Spring Mills 2022
item.description:
Another year, another Black Friday trip to Spring Mills. It’s beautiful in a stark kind of way this time of year. Always good for a few pictures.

View 67 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Natural Bridge
item.description:
A few days at Natural Bridge in Kentucky. Worth the drive. A lot of fun hikes, a neat sky bridge, and great fun all around.

View 62 more...
View on Flickr

item.description: View on Flickr

item.title: Another Turkey Run
item.description: View on Flickr

item.title: Spring Mill Camping
item.description: View on Flickr

item.title: Clifty Falls
item.description:
A fun two nights at Clifty Falls Inn. Crazy time getting in with the ice–both main gates were closed (they hadn’t cleared the roads) and we had to go in the DNR service entrance. Worth it in the end though.

View 2 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Two Counties
item.description:
Travel for a funeral, take advantage of the beauty of cold nature and a camping trip to Brown County.

View 19 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: McCormick's Creek 2022
item.description:
First day hike again! More of a first day play in the water with all the rain and flooding, but still a lot of fun.

View 21 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Eiteljorg Etc
item.description:
Went to Jingle Rails at Eiteljorg and to the canal. A good day.

View on Flickr

item.title: Spring Mills 2021
item.description:
Another Black Friday, another day out of doors. Chilly, but still well worth the exploration. The kids had a blast.

View 14 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Nature Friends at Holliday Park
item.description:
Meeting up with friends, in Nature! Holliday Park is a wonderful find.

View on Flickr

item.title: Nature Friends at Lilly Lake
item.description:
More meeting up with friends, in Nature! This time at Lilly Lake (Eagle Creek Park). So pretty in the fall.

View on Flickr

item.title: Adventures with Children
item.description:
On leave with the newest addition, so I’m taking the older ones out and about to let mum and baby bond. Great times. Interesting pictures.

View 2 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Hendricks County Fair
item.description:
2021, things returning to normal. Kids loved the tractors and animals.

View on Flickr

item.title: On the Beach 2021
item.description:
Vacation! It’s been a long strange year (plus now). About time we took a chance to get back to the beach. First time for the middle one. Great fun. Glad to be home at the end.

View 23 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: McCormick's Creek 2021
item.description:
Another camping trip with a number of other families. Great fun. Beautiful–if a touch cool–weather.

item.title: Eagle Creek Melting
item.description:
After weeks of cold, it’s nice to be out and about again.

item.title: Snow Days (2021)
item.description:
Another few snow days, up to a foot. Lots of playing and sledding.

item.title: Spring Mills 2020
item.description:
Tradition! We’ve hiked Spring Mills each day after Thanksgiving for several years now. Certainly beats waiting in lines (especially with COVID-19…). And it was a lovely fall day for it.

View 1 more...
View on Flickr

item.title: Fungus Among Us
item.description:
I love taking pictures of mushrooms and other fungi. They’re just so cool looking!

View 74 more...
View on Flickr
